T s e Wit A S A 5 SR W B TS, SR § 6 A 1403(37) e 4 feaw, 2006 R PR Ft o sl deais FLa 1889(3) W@ 2 W, 2006 Sl WA 981(3) WS 15 5, 2007 BRI ST Feaad weirer i | MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 15t September, 2009 No. 15-25/09NTCA.—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections(1) and (2) of Section 38L of the Wild Life (Protection) Act, 1972 (53 of 1972), the Central Government hereby appoints the following Chairperson and Members to the National Tiger Conservation Authority for a period ofthree years from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette and for that purpose ‘makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment and Forests number S.0. 1403 (E), dated the 4th September, 2006, namely:— «, In the said notification,— (@) in the opening paragraph, the words “for a period of three years with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette” shall be omitted; (b) for serial numbers | to 26 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely :— ‘The Minister in charge of the Ministry —Chairman of Environment and Forests . The Minister of State for Environment —Vice- and Forests (Vacant) Chairperson . Smt. Maneka Gandhi, Member of —Member Parliament (Lok Sabha) . Member of Parliament —Member (Lok Sabha) Vacant Shri Santosh Bagrodia, Member —Member of Parliament (Rajya Sabha) Shri Brijendra Singh —Member 28, Sunder Nagar, New Delhi-110003. . Shri Valmik Thapar —Member G-13, Maharani Bagh, New Delhi-110014. ShriP. K. Sen —Member B-11/2275, Vasant Kunj, New Delhi-110070. . Dr. Prakash Murlidhar Amte —Member Lok Biradari Prakal, Hemal Kasa, Post Bhamragad, District Gad Chiroli, Maharashtra. Pin-442710. . Dr. Urmila Pingle —Member 3-34/5 Madhuvan Enclave, St. No. 4, Habshiguda, Hyderabad-500007. Andhra Pradesh. . Dr.K.
